scope.title: Shell gate migration from legacy static assets to Next.js App Router shell contract

non_blocking_findings.summary: Some shards could not independently verify all shell semantics because the review was intentionally split; final synthesis accepted that test/workbench-shell.test.js covers the missing source-level semantics while runtime gates cover mounted route behavior.

summary: DeepSeek confirmed that test/workbench-shell.test.js no longer uses legacy desktop.html/mobile.html/workbench.js/styles.css as current acceptance dependencies and now guards the Next.js/Ant Design shell source contract, mounted runtime replacement gates, projection API/hook behavior, operation readouts, scheduler/next-action/agent lifecycle controls, failure-no-false-positive behavior, and responsive overflow checks. Inventory and plan state remain consistent: P6.3 is complete while P6.4 still blocks legacy static deletion.
